values.content:
=whats the outcome of this call return one of these 
not_interested — lead shut it down
callback_requested — lead wants to talk later
strong_interest — lead is engaged, wants to move forward
appointment_set — booking was made
dnc — lead asked to be removed or placed on do not call list
call_dropped — call ended abruptly mid-conversation with no clear resolution
no_signal — can't tell / neutral

Respond with ONLY the label, nothing else.

{{ $json.transcript_formatted }}
